description_long: This is a black baseball cap featuring a structured, six-panel design with a flat brim. The front of the cap displays a prominent, stylized bird logo outlined in red, giving it a bold, urban aesthetic. The brim is flat and wide, typical of modern streetwear styles, and the crown is rounded and firm. The back of the cap has an opening above the adjustable strap, with the words 'effing gear' embroidered in red. The cap appears to be made primarily of cotton or a cotton-blend fabric, with reinforced stitching and ventilation eyelets on each panel. The overall look is sleek and contemporary, suitable for casual or urban environments.
description: A black, flat-brim baseball cap with a red-outlined bird logo on the front and 'effing gear' embroidered on the back. The cap has a structured, six-panel design and a modern streetwear style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold bird logo outlined in red on the crown and the flat brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cap's smooth, uninterrupted black surface and the flat brim's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opening above the adjustable strap and the 'effing gear' embroidery in red.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the bird logo and the cap's structured panels.
